mapper.sql:
where deleted = 0
and title like concat('%', #{query.title}, '%')
and issuing_organization like concat('%', #{query.issuingOrganization}, '%')
and status = #{query.status}
mapper.select: select id, title, issuing_organization, policy_source, summary, content_html, publish_time, status from policy_article where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into policy_article (title, issuing_organization, policy_source, summary, content_html, publish_time, status, deleted) values (#{title}, #{issuingOrganization}, #{policySource}, #{summary}, #{contentHtml}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update: update policy_article set title = #{title}, issuing_organization = #{issuingOrganization}, policy_source = #{policySource}, summary = #{summary}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, publish_time = #{publishTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
